title: The Core of Infinity
description: Tired of digging in the mine for a long time? And the search for resources did not bring results? Then your choice is "Core Resonance" This mod will make the gameplay easier for you and the necessary resources will be in your hands :)
body:
## "The Core of Infinity"
### These modifications add New ores (crystals) that you will find in the world. With these crystals you will be able to make a special useful item called "Core resonance" Which will make the gameplay easier for you and get vanilla resources. (This mod makes the gameplay easier.)

**Attention, these mods may be under development and a full release may not be released very soon and so far only three versions are available**
### Available versions: 1.12.2, 1.15.2 Versions on Forge, 1.21.1 Versions on NeoForge
### Mod support: 1.21.1 - NeoForge
### The future of the mod version ~~1.16.5, 1.17.1 1.18.2, 1.19.2,~~ 1.21.4
### Available language: END,RUS,(UKR - 16.11.15)
"Mod support" This means that this mod is currently being supported and updated on this version
### Information
Crystal resonances themselves are the main ore for all this fashion can be detected during mining
This crystal (ore) With its composition, it glows in the dark so it is easy to find it in the mine
![Crystals are shining in the mine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/020f66a499a9fa43a8d5b365b4a845520283f310.png)
![item in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d978979735915ecfb12a04e7f1560ccb94cc35f.png)
This is how the crystals look (A frame from the inventory)

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c3d8ca0706adf96fa4203488c42215c75097fe9.png)
Some crafts can be obtained by completing an achievement or a challenge
